context: Agent must produce a GitHub Actions CI workflow using nx affected with explicit base/head flags, as required by the nx-workspace-patterns skill.

checklist.name: Triggers on pull_request to main
checklist.description: The workflow triggers on pull_request events and targets the main branch.

checklist.name: fetch-depth: 0 for full git history
checklist.description: The checkout step uses fetch-depth: 0 so nx affected can compute the correct base.

checklist.name: nx affected used instead of run-many --all
checklist.description: The workflow uses `nx affected` (not `nx run-many --all`) for running tasks.

checklist.name: Explicit --base=origin/main and --head=HEAD
checklist.description: The nx affected invocation includes --base=origin/main and --head=HEAD.

checklist.name: lint, test, and build targets covered
checklist.description: The workflow runs lint, test, and build for affected projects (in one or multiple steps).

checklist.name: --parallel flag present
checklist.description: The nx affected invocation includes a --parallel flag (value 3 or any reasonable number).
